nodes.name: Webhook: OAuth Callback
nodes.notes: Receives redirect from Google after authorization

parameters.jsCode:
// Build email with Manager access instructions const data = $('Extract Business Profile ID').item.json; const SERVICE_EMAIL = 'reviewai@YOUR-PROJECT.iam.gserviceaccount.com'; const emailHtml = `

✅ OAuth Connected!

Hi there,

🎉 Step 1 Complete!

${data.restaurant_name} is connected.

  • ✅ OAuth authorized
  • ✅ Tokens secured

⏳ One More Step

Add Manager Access (2 minutes)

📋 Quick Steps

1. Go to business.google.com
2. Your business → Settings → Users
3. Click "Add Users"
4. Add: ${SERVICE_EMAIL}
5. Role: Manager
6. Click "Invite"

Verify Manager Access

Watch video tutorial

Questions? Reply to this email.

`; return [{ json: { to: data.owner_email, subject: `✅ ${data.restaurant_name} - One More Step Required`, html: emailHtml } }];

parameters.responseBody:
=

❌ Error

{{ $json.message || 'Authorization failed' }}

Try Again
